transcript.text: Hello Brew & Bloom team! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We help cafes take orders and answer customers automatically, 24/7. Could I show you how in a quick 15-minute call this week?
Yes sounds good, call me tomorrow.
Hello! I'm Akash from LeadPilot — we help clinics handle appointment bookings automatically. Open to a quick call?
Not interested, please remove me from your list.
Hi! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We set up AI assistants that book classes and answer members automatically. Fancy a quick 15-min call?
How much does it cost?
Hello! Akash here from LeadPilot — we help shops capture customer enquiries even after closing time. Would a short call work?
What exactly do you do? Explain in simple words.
Hi Royal Spice team! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We help restaurants take reservations automatically so no call goes missed. Could we chat 15 minutes?
This month is packed. Can you call me next week?
Hello! Akash from LeadPilot here — we help bakeries manage orders automatically. Interested in a quick call?
STOP
Hi! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We set up 24/7 AI assistants that answer customers and book repair slots automatically. Worth a quick call?
We already have a website, why would we need this?
Hello Oceanview team! Akash from LeadPilot — we handle guest questions and bookings around the clock. Could I show you in 15 minutes?
Sounds interesting but I'm slammed right now. Ping me in a couple of days?
Hello! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We answer routine client questions instantly so your team can focus on real work. Open to a short intro call?
Who else have you worked with? Any accounting firms?
Hi! Akash from LeadPilot here. We book appointments for salons automatically over WhatsApp, even at midnight. Can I show you how in a 15-minute call?
ok
Hello! I'm Akash from LeadPilot — we take customer orders automatically so you never miss one. Could we do a quick 15-minute call?
আমি আগ্রহী। কাল ফোন করুন।
Hi! Akash from LeadPilot. We capture customer enquiries for shops 24/7. Interested in a quick chat?
Stop messaging me!! I don't want this.
Hello Cafe Milano team! I'm Akash from LeadPilot — we answer customer messages and take table bookings automatically. Fancy a quick call?
Is this a scam? How did you get my number?
Hi! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We book classes and answer members automatically, 24/7. Worth a quick 15-minute call?
How much is it?
Fair question! Pricing depends on what you need, so we keep it tailored — I'd rather walk you through options on a quick call than quote blind. No obligation at all.
Alright, let's do a call on Friday then.
Hi! Akash from LeadPilot — we answer customer messages and book repair slots automatically. Could I show you in 15 minutes?
Call me today after 5pm.
Hi Royal Spice team! I'm Akash from LeadPilot. We take reservations automatically so no call goes missed. Open to a quick chat?
Send me some more details first, then we'll see.
Hello Oceanview team! Akash from LeadPilot — we handle guest questions and bookings around the clock. Could I show you in 15 minutes?
I'm just the receptionist, the owner handles this stuff. He's back Monday.
